title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Nucleus Software International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Nucleus Software International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Nucleus Software International Enterprises. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Indore-based team.

About Nucleus Software International Enterprises:
Nucleus Software International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nucleus Software International Enterprises!
